name: Andy Snitzer
abstract: Andy Snitzer is an American saxophonist, composer, and arranger. He is known for his work as a session musician with numerous famous artists, including Paul Simon, Aretha Franklin, Martika, Sting, The Rolling Stones, and Chaka Khan.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Brecker
about_quotes.evidence: A friend of mine, Andy Snitzer, wonderful saxophonist, also got a business degree.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Brecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 12, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: my friends who live in New York who had played in the horn section with the Stones, Mike Davis on trombone, Kent Smith on trumpet, and Andy Snitzer, the saxophone player who left the Stones to go with Paul Simon.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022
